provider.description: Which LLM provider to use by default.

base_url.description: Optional base URL override. Built-in providers use their standard endpoint unless this is set. Required for provider=custom.

api_key_secret.description: Name of the stored secret to resolve at runtime, not the API key value itself. This is a secret reference name. Required at runtime for OpenAI, OpenRouter, and Together.

default_model.description: Optional component-level fallback model. Per-invocation input.model overrides this value. Built-in providers use a provider default when this is empty.

timeout_ms.description: Optional request timeout in milliseconds. Leave empty to use runtime or host defaults.
